Component Parameter

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xf4
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only register encoding the hardware configuration parameters of this UART instance. Only present when UART_ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:24] reserved rw 0x0 -
[23:16] fifo_mode r 0x0 FIFO_MODE
[15:14] reserved2 rw 0x0 -
[13] dma_extra r 0x0 DMA_EXTRA
[12] uart_add_encoded_params r 0x0 UART_ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS
[11] shadow r 0x0 SHADOW
[10] fifo_stat r 0x0 FIFO_STAT
[9] fifo_access r 0x0 FIFO_ACCESS
[8] additional_feat r 0x0 ADDITIONAL_FEAT
[7] sir_lp_mode r 0x0 SIR_LP_MODE
[6] sir_mode r 0x0 SIR_MODE
[5] thre_mode r 0x0 THRE_MODE
[4] afce_mode r 0x0 AFCE_MODE
[3:2] reserved3 rw 0x0 -
[1:0] apb_data_width r 0x0 APB_DATA_WIDTH

Field Descriptions

fifo_mode - FIFO_MODE

FIFO depth. 0x00=0, 0x01=16, 0x02=32, ..., 0x80=2048.

dma_extra - DMA_EXTRA

DMA extra handshaking signals present.

uart_add_encoded_params - UART_ADD_ENCODED_PARAMS

Encoded parameter register present.

shadow - SHADOW

Shadow registers present.

fifo_stat - FIFO_STAT

FIFO status registers present.

fifo_access - FIFO_ACCESS

FIFO access test mode present.

additional_feat - ADDITIONAL_FEAT

Additional features present (UCV, CTR registers).

sir_lp_mode - SIR_LP_MODE

IrDA SIR low-power mode present.

sir_mode - SIR_MODE

IrDA SIR mode present.

thre_mode - THRE_MODE

Programmable THRE interrupt mode present.

afce_mode - AFCE_MODE

Auto flow control mode present.

apb_data_width - APB_DATA_WIDTH

APB data bus width. 00=8 bits, 01=16 bits, 10=32 bits.
